nodes.label: INTO_VIEW
nodes.description: Scroll the widget into view using the least amount of energy possible

nodes.label: TOP_OR_LEFT
nodes.description: Always scroll the widget so it appears at the top/Left of the scrollable area

nodes.label: CENTER
nodes.description: Always scroll the widget so it appears at the center of the scrollable area, if possible

nodes.label: BOTTOM_OR_RIGHT
nodes.description: Always scroll the widget so it appears at the bottom/Right of the scrollable area

nodes.label: OREN_NAYAR_DIFFUSE
nodes.description: A BSDF node for diffuse reflections

nodes.label: BURLEY_DIFFUSE
nodes.description: A BSDF node for Burley diffuse reflections

nodes.label: TRANSLUCENT
nodes.description: A BSDF node for pure diffuse transmission

nodes.label: DIELECTRIC
nodes.description: A reflection/transmission BSDF node based on a microfacet model and a Fresnel curve for dielectrics

nodes.label: CONDUCTOR
nodes.description: A reflection BSDF node based on a microfacet model and a Fresnel curve for conductors/metals

nodes.label: GENERALIZED_SCHLICK
nodes.description: A reflection/transmission BSDF node based on a microfacet model and a generalized Schlick Fresnel curve

nodes.label: SUBSURFACE
nodes.description: A subsurface scattering BSDF for true subsurface scattering

nodes.label: SHEEN
nodes.description: A microfacet BSDF for the back-scattering properties of cloth-like materials

nodes.label: THIN_FILM
nodes.description: Adds an iridescent thin film layer over a microfacet base BSDF
